summary: Phase 4 Final Execution testing complete. All 33 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend elements verified including new Stop-Loss/Take-Profit order buttons. Trading page fully functional with chart, order book, order form with Market/Limit/SL/TP types, pair selector with 15 pairs including NENO-EUR and NENO-USDT.
critical_code_review_comments: Stop-Loss and Take-Profit order types correctly create orders with 'pending_trigger' status
pending_trigger orders can be cancelled - fix was verified working
Settlement engine correctly handles crypto-to-fiat, crypto-to-crypto, and fiat-to-crypto conversions with 0.3% fee
Card infrastructure enforces max 3 virtual cards per user - correctly implemented
Card funding from crypto via settlement pipeline works end-to-end
Paper trading creates separate portfolio with simulated trades (is_paper=true)
Margin trading infrastructure ready - accounts, leverage settings, positions tracking
WebSocket status endpoint returns connection info
Admin-only endpoints correctly return 403 for non-admin users
Frontend TradingPage has SL/TP buttons with data-testid for testing
Trigger price input appears when SL/TP order type selected
seed_data_creation: Test orders created during testing, wallet deposits for conversion tests, card created for top-up tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 Final Execution features fully tested. Trading page route is /trade not /trading. Order types include market, limit, stop_loss, take_profit. Stop-loss/take-profit orders have pending_trigger status until trigger price hit. Card max is 3 virtual cards per user. Conversion rates available for 14 assets.

trading_pairs.GET /api/trading/pairs: PASS - Returns 15 pairs including NENO-EUR, NENO-USDT
trading_pairs.GET /api/trading/pairs/NENO-EUR/ticker: PASS - Returns ticker with last_price, bid, ask
trading_pairs.GET /api/trading/pairs/BTC-EUR/orderbook: PASS - Returns bids and asks arrays

order_types.market_order_buy: PASS - ETH-EUR market buy, status=filled or partially_filled
order_types.limit_order_sell: PASS - NENO-EUR limit sell at 0.60, status=open

order_cancellation.cancel_pending_trigger: PASS - Cancelled stop-loss order with pending_trigger status

wallet.balances: PASS - Returns wallets with EUR values

cards.card_top_up: PASS - Top-up with 0.01 BTC converted to EUR

paper_trading.paper_trade: PASS - Executed simulated NENO-EUR buy, is_paper=true

api_endpoints_verified: POST /api/auth/login - Auth for regular and admin users
POST /api/trading/orders - Market, Limit, Stop-Loss, Take-Profit orders
GET /api/wallet/balances - Wallet balances with EUR values
POST /api/wallet/fund-card - Fund card from crypto via settlement pipeline
